name: Crossing the Red Sea
description: Israel passes through the sea on dry ground.

name: Covenant at Sinai
description: The Lord gives the law to Moses.

name: Fall of Jericho
description: First major city taken in Canaan.

name: David captures Jerusalem
description: Zion becomes the city of David.

name: Solomon dedicates the Temple
description: The ark rests in the house Yahweh promised.

name: Birth of Jesus
description: The Word becomes flesh in David’s town.

name: Pentecost
description: The Spirit poured out; church born in power.

name: Paul’s conversion
description: Saul meets the risen Christ on the road.

name: Paul at the Areopagus
description: The unknown God proclaimed to philosophers.
